title: Stop Selling AI Agents, Sell AI Solutions Instead

extracted.hook: If you want to make money with AI, you need to stop selling AI agents and workflows and start selling AI solutions.
extracted.credential_drop: "When I was working full-time at Goldman Sachs in business intelligence, automation was my entire role. And that job had existed for years." (early)
transitions: That leads us right into the next section.
So, you know why selling AI doesn't work and that you need to sell AI solutions, but how do you actually do this for yourself step by step? That's what we're going to cover now in a few simple steps.
extracted.cta: "if you enjoyed the video or you learned something new, please give it a like. Definitely helps me out a ton."
vocabulary: diagnose, then solve, then value, then price
analogies: "Think of it like a taxi ride"
"Think of it like a home renovation"

time_references: one up in an hour and a half

extracted.vulnerability: "The food hasn't changed. It's nothing new, but suddenly people are noticing it." (early)

accelerate: When I was working full-time at Goldman Sachs in business intelligence, automation was my entire role.
And that job had existed for years.
slow: So the framework we're going to be talking about today is to diagnose, then solve, then value, then price. And it's a simple process that I use every time.

frameworks: "Solve means build the system that fixes that exact pain."
"Price. Anchor your offer around that value."
